# castai_ai_optimizer_model_registry (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# S3 model registry
resource "castai_ai_optimizer_model_registry" "s3_example" {
  provider_type = "S3"
  credentials   = jsonencode({
    access_key_id     = "AKIA..."
    secret_access_key = "..."
  })

  s3 {
    bucket = "my-company-model-registry"
    region = "us-east-1"
    prefix = "models/"
  }
}

# GCS model registry
resource "castai_ai_optimizer_model_registry" "gcs_example" {
  provider_type = "GCS"
  credentials   = jsonencode({
    service_account_key = "..."
  })

  gcs {
    bucket = "my-company-model-registry"
    prefix = "models/"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `credentials` (String, Sensitive) JSON-encoded credentials for accessing the bucket.

### Optional

- `gcs` (Block List, Max: 1) Google Cloud Storage provider configuration. Required when provider_type is GCS. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--gcs))
- `provider_type` (String) Provider type: S3 or GCS. Defaults to S3.
- `s3` (Block List, Max: 1) AWS S3 provider configuration. Required when provider_type is S3. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--s3))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Registry status.
- `status_reason` (String) Reason for the current status.

<a id="nestedblock--s3"></a>
### Nested Schema for `s3`

Required:

- `bucket` (String) S3 bucket name.
- `region` (String) AWS region of the S3 bucket.

Optional:

- `prefix` (String) Path prefix within the bucket.

Read-Only:

- `user_name` (String) IAM user name created by onboarding.


<a id="nestedblock--gcs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `gcs`

Required:

- `bucket` (String) GCS bucket name.

Optional:

- `prefix` (String) Path prefix within the bucket.

Read-Only:

- `service_account` (String) Service account email generated by onboarding.
